## Describe the bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Environment
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 120]
- iNatSpectro version: [e.g. from chrome://extensions]
- Page/site where it happened: [e.g. inaturalist.org/observations/123]
